name: Zoho Cliq
description: Team chat and collaboration platform with channels, messaging, bots, and integrations.

auth_methods.note: Zoho Cliq REST API uses OAuth 2.0; access tokens are passed in the Authorization header as 'Zoho-oauthtoken <access_token>'.

credential_access.note: Developers can sign in to the Zoho API Console to create a client and obtain client_id and client_secret without mention of payment or manual approval.

api_surface.note: The REST API v2 provides endpoints for messages, channels, users, bots, webhooks and more (full reference available in the v2 docs).

buildability.note: Public REST API docs and self-serve OAuth client registration exist; developers can obtain credentials and call APIs today.

queries: Zoho Cliq authentication OAuth client id client secret "Cliq" "OAuth" site:zoho.com
Zoho API Console create client "api-console.zoho.com" obtain client_id client_secret ZohoCliq
Zoho Cliq pricing API access "Cliq" pricing "API" site:zoho.com/cliq
Does Zoho Cliq API require paid plan partnership "Cliq API" "partner"
